text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Nournews: The duration of US‑Iran talks in Islamabad remains unclear, and it is even uncertain whether they will take place. If Iran’s conditions are met, the talks will likely be one‑day only. A trilateral meeting is possible. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Nournews：美国与伊朗在伊斯兰堡的会谈持续时间尚不清楚，甚至不确定是否会举行。如果伊朗的条件得到满足，会谈可能仅持续一天。三方会谈是有可能的。 @wfwitness

text: Prof. John Mearsheimer: It is widely recognized that it is the Israelis who led us into this disastrous war. It’s the Israelis who are preventing us from getting a ceasefire. The American public’s views on Israel are undergoing a sea change. This situation only gets worse with the passage of time.” When a country loses a war, everybody goes back to the causes. When you win, you celebrate. When you lose, you ask: How did this happen? When it’s a disastrous loss like this, people demand answers. The evidence is clear — it was the Israelis who led him by the nose into this disaster. U.S.–Israeli relations are going to be badly damaged.
text_zh: 约翰·米尔斯海默教授：人们普遍认为，正是以色列人将我们带入了这场灾难性的战争。是以色列人在阻止我们实现停火。美国公众对以色列的看法正在发生翻天覆地的变化。这种情况只会随着时间的推移而恶化。”当一个国家输掉战争时，每个人都会回顾原因。当你赢了，你会庆祝。当你输了，你会问：这是怎么发生的？当发生像这样灾难性的失败时，人们会要求答案。证据很清楚——是以色列人牵着他的鼻子走进了这场灾难。美以关系将受到严重损害。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Iran Just Rewrote the Rules of Economic Warfare in Its Own Waters
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 伊朗刚刚改写了其领海内的经济战规则

text: Trump Vs Former Loyalists: Fierce Clash Ravages MAGA Camp A full-scale political rupture is tearing through the MAGA movement, with Trump & his former loyalists exchanging insults - including claims he is “controlled,” a “slave,” & “Epstein class” - as he lashes out, calling them all "low IQ". READ MORE
text_zh: 特朗普与前忠诚派：激烈的冲突摧毁了MAGA阵营。一场全面的政治决裂正在撕裂MAGA运动，特朗普与他以前的忠诚派互相辱骂——包括声称他被“控制”、“是奴隶”和“爱泼斯坦阶层”——他猛烈抨击他们，称他们都是“低智商”。阅读更多

text: WarTranslated LPDS Krymskaya was attacked again overnight. It is part of Transneft’s oil pipeline network. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042864829996609828/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated LPDS Krymskaya昨晚再次遭到袭击。它是Transneft石油管道网络的一部分。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042864829996609828/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor John Bolton warns it’s a mistake to let an adversary shape your negotiation team, saying sending the vice president plays into that. He suggests Trump is looking for an exit, and Vance will be the one trying to secure it. https://x.com/clashreport/status/2042861161121489230/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 约翰·博尔顿警告说，让对手塑造你的谈判团队是一个错误，并表示派遣副总统正中下怀。他暗示特朗普正在寻找出路，而万斯将是试图确保出路的人。https://x.com/clashreport/status/2042861161121489230/video/1 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @amaherYAH : i argue the iranian regime actually emerges from this truce with the sole obsession with political survival/adaptaion in a new mideast and among the vast majority of the Iranians. the 'axis of resistance' is the last thing it would care about to be honest. it's facing a dilemma. Interesting take by Mohammad Atai’s, arguing the war has made reviving Axis of Resistance a priority for Iran https://www.middleeasteye.net/opinion/how-war-iran-revived-axis-resistance - Vali Nasr tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @amaherYAH：我认为伊朗政权实际上是从这次休战中走出来的，其唯一的执念是在新的中东和绝大多数伊朗人中实现政治生存/适应。老实说，“抵抗之弧”是它最不关心的东西。它正面临困境。Mohammad Atai的观点很有趣，他认为战争使复兴“抵抗之弧”成为伊朗的优先事项 https://www.middleeasteye.net/opinion/how-war-iran-revived-axis-resistance - Vali Nasr 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇵🇰 The US delegation has gone to Islamabad for talks with Iran https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2042862409681953260/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇵🇰 美国代表团已前往伊斯兰堡与伊朗进行会谈 https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2042862409681953260/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - J.D. Vance and the U.S. delegation arrive in Islamabad, Pakistan. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042861912770105718/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 突发新闻 - J.D.万斯和美国代表团抵达巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042861912770105718/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index US Vice President JD Vance has arrived in Islamabad, Pakistan for talks with Iran. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 美国副总统J.D.万斯已抵达巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡，与伊朗进行会谈。推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ ❗️ BREAKING | 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 According to CNN, U.S. intelligence indicates China could soon deliver MANPADS to Iran, potentially through third countries to obscure their origin. ▪️ Beijing has rejected the claim, labeling it false and calling for de-escalation. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：❗️ ❗️ 突发 | 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 据CNN报道，美国情报显示中国可能很快向伊朗交付便携式防空导弹（MANPADS），可能通过第三国以掩盖其来源。▪️ 北京否认了这一说法，称其为虚假信息，并呼吁局势降温。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: WarMonitor U.S. intelligence suggests China may soon supply Iran with new air defense systems, including MANPADS. This could indicate Iran is using ceasefire negotiations to replenish its weapons stockpiles with support from allies like Russia and China. (CNN) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042857598811001062/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 美国情报显示，中国可能很快会向伊朗提供新的防空系统，包括便携式防空导弹。这可能表明伊朗正在利用停火谈判，在俄罗斯和中国等盟友的支持下补充其武器储备。（CNN）https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042857598811001062/photo/1 推文

text: Professor Robert Pape: Iran has enough enriched uranium for 10 to 16 nuclear weapons. You could expect a nuclear test in six months — maybe a year. There is nothing the United States or the world can do about that.
text_zh: 罗伯特·佩普教授：伊朗拥有足够制造10到16枚核武器的浓缩铀。你可以预期在六个月内——也许是一年内——进行核试验。美国或世界对此无能为力。

text: 🟡 Hezbollah isued 58 military statements targeting Zionist army gatherings and positions on Friday, April 10, 2026 Major sustained operation (most significant): intense repeated strikes on Al-Marj detention center from ~07:30 onward. Dozens of operations combining missile strikes + swarms of drones at roughly hourly intervals throughout the day and into the night - applying continuous heavy pressure on the position.
text_zh: 🟡 真主党在2026年4月10日星期五发布了58份针对犹太复国主义军队集结地和阵地的军事声明。重大持续行动（最显著）：从约07:30开始对Al-Marj拘留中心进行密集的反复打击。全天及夜间大约每小时进行数十次导弹袭击+无人机群的联合行动——对该阵地施加持续的沉重压力。

text: Professor Robert Pape on Iran War: The United States has suffered its worst strategic defeat since the Vietnam War. This may even become a bigger defeat than Vietnam. Iran has emerged in just 40 days as a rising fourth center of world power.
text_zh: 罗伯特·佩普教授谈伊朗战争：美国遭受了自越南战争以来最严重的战略失败。这甚至可能成为比越南战争更大的失败。伊朗在短短40天内就崛起为世界第四大权力中心。

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The Lebanese regime wants to have normalization talks with Israel, rather than a ceasefire through the ongoing Iran-Trump negotiations.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩政权希望与以色列进行关系正常化谈判，而不是通过正在进行的伊朗-特朗普谈判实现停火。

text: 🇱🇧 Not surprised at all... 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 一点也不惊讶... 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: John Bolton: It’s a mistake to send the vice president. You don’t let your adversary pick your negotiation team. Trump wants a way out — and Vance will try to find it.
text_zh: 约翰·博尔顿：派遣副总统是一个错误。你不能让你的对手挑选你的谈判团队。特朗普想要一条出路——而万斯会试图找到它。

text: John Bolton: Given Trump’s panic, we’re very likely at the end of it. He just wants to declare victory — and move on to something else. It would take a major mistake by Iran to force his hand.
text_zh: 约翰·博尔顿：鉴于特朗普的恐慌，我们很可能已经走到了尽头。他只是想宣布胜利——然后继续做别的事情。伊朗需要犯一个重大错误才会迫使他采取行动。

text: 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. intelligence indicates China is preparing to deliver new air defense systems to Iran within the next few weeks, CNN reported late on Friday, citing three people familiar with recent intelligence assessments.
text_zh: 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 据CNN周五晚间援引三位熟悉近期情报评估的人士的话报道，美国情报显示中国正准备在未来几周内向伊朗交付新的防空系统。

text: John Bolton: Trump couldn’t find a way out. He was grappling to find the exit. Those and many other social media postings he’s made show his desperation. And I think the Iranians believe they have the upper hand, at least psychologically, at this point because of that.
text_zh: 约翰·博尔顿：特朗普找不到出路。他正在努力寻找出口。他发布的那些以及许多其他社交媒体帖子显示了他的绝望。我认为伊朗人认为他们目前至少在心理上占据了上风，因为这一点。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Have you felt the impact of the US/Israel imposed war on Iran yet?
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 你感受到美国/以色列强加给伊朗的战争的影响了吗？

text: 🇪🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Netanyahu greeted with middle finger during live broadcast in Spain following his defamatory remarks against the country.
text_zh: 🇪🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 内塔尼亚胡在西班牙发表针对该国的诽谤性言论后，在直播中被竖中指。

text: 🇨🇳 "Nobody knows win better then me!" Time for a Chinese rap music break. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇨🇳 “没人比我更懂赢！”是时候来一段中文说唱音乐休息一下了。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @ulrichspeck : "US intelligence indicates that China is preparing to deliver new air defense systems to Iran within the next few weeks" https://edition.cnn.com/2026/04/11/politics/us-intelligence-iran-china-weapons tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @ulrichspeck：“美国情报显示，中国正准备在未来几周内向伊朗交付新的防空系统” https://edition.cnn.com/2026/04/11/politics/us-intelligence-iran-china-weapons 推文

text: WarTranslated Overnight, Tver came under attack by strike drones. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042856835867177270/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 特维尔昨晚遭到攻击无人机的袭击。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042856835867177270/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated The Kremlin says it will not extend the truce after Easter. Zelensky says Ukraine is ready for a mirrored ceasefire during the Easter holidays to give people safety. Meanwhile, the Kremlin announced an Easter truce from 4:00 PM on April 11 through April 12. - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 克里姆林宫表示，复活节后不会延长休战。泽连斯基表示，乌克兰准备在复活节假期期间进行对等的停火，以保障人民的安全。与此同时，克里姆林宫宣布从4月11日下午4:00至4月12日进行复活节休战。 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Netanyahu greeted with middle finger during live broadcast in Spain following his defamatory remarks against the country.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡在西班牙发表针对该国的诽谤性言论后，在直播中被竖中指。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Reuters: Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei is recovering from severe injuries, including reported facial disfigurement and leg wounds, sustained in an airstrike earlier in the war. He is said to remain involved in decision-making via remote communication, though his condition has not been officially confirmed and no public images or appearances have been released since the attack. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 路透社：伊朗最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊正在从重伤中恢复，据报道包括面部毁容和腿部伤口，这些伤是在战争早期的空袭中造成的。据说他仍然通过远程通信参与决策，尽管他的病情尚未得到官方证实，自袭击以来也没有发布过公开照片或露面。 @wfwitness

text: 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 U.S. intelligence suggests that China is getting ready to supply Iran with new air defense systems (MANPADS) in the coming weeks, according to three sources familiar with recent assessments, according to CNN. Two of the sources told CNN there are indications that Beijing is working to route the shipments through third countries to mask their true origin. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 据CNN报道，三位熟悉近期评估的消息人士称，美国情报显示中国正准备在未来几周内向伊朗提供新的防空系统（便携式防空导弹）。其中两位消息人士告诉CNN，有迹象表明北京正致力于通过第三国转运这些货物，以掩盖其真实来源。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸 Details of the Iranian negotiation team members — The meeting of the Iranian delegation, Mr. Ghalibaf with Mr. Shehbaz Sharif (PM of Pakistan), is scheduled for today, and after this meeting, the details of the Iran-US talks will be clarified. —…" 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iran raises U.S. breaches with Pakistan’s PM Tasnim correspondent dispatched to Islamabad, Pakistan: — The Iranian delegation will raise the issue of breaches by the American side in today's noon meeting with Shehbaz Sharif, the Prime Minister of Pakistan. — The release of Iran's assets and a ceasefire in Lebanon were among the preconditions for starting negotiations. — The U.S. had informed Pakistan, as the mediator of the talks, that it agreed to these preconditions and some other conditions for starting negotiations. However, some of these have not yet been fulfilled. — The Iranian delegation intends to reach an assessment of the U.S. position and its adherence to commitments in today's sessions; after that, it will decide on negotiations with the U.S. — CNN’s report of multi-day talks in Islamabad is false; if held, they’ll likely last one day. — Iran is currently in the stage of evaluating the other side, and if a dialogue takes place, it will be from this afternoon, and for now, the plan is for one day.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇮🇷⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸 伊朗谈判小组成员详情——伊朗代表团加利巴夫先生与谢赫巴兹·谢里夫（巴基斯坦总理）的会议定于今天举行，会议结束后，伊美会谈的细节将明确。——……” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗向巴基斯坦总理提出美国违约问题。塔斯尼姆通讯社记者派驻巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡：——伊朗代表团将在今天中午与巴基斯坦总理谢赫巴兹·谢里夫的会议上提出美方违约的问题。——释放伊朗资产和黎巴嫩停火是开始谈判的前提条件。——美国曾通知作为会谈调解人的巴基斯坦，它同意这些前提条件以及开始谈判的其他一些条件。然而，其中一些尚未实现。——伊朗代表团打算在今天的会议中评估美国的立场及其对承诺的遵守情况；之后，它将决定是否与美国进行谈判。——CNN关于伊斯兰堡多日会谈的报道是虚假的；如果举行，可能会持续一天。——伊朗目前处于评估对方的阶段，如果进行对话，将从今天下午开始，目前计划为一天。

text: A Ukrainian FPV drone encounters a resting Russian soldier.
text_zh: 一架乌克兰FPV无人机遇到了一名正在休息的俄罗斯士兵。

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 The US delegation has landed in Islamabad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 JD Vance arrives in Islamabad for negotiations with Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 美国代表团已降落在伊斯兰堡。🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 J.D.万斯抵达伊斯兰堡与伊朗进行谈判。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 U.S. Vice President J.D. Vance was greeted by Pakistani Field Marshal Asim Munir, Deputy Prime Minister Mohammad Ishaq Dar, and Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi upon arriving in Islamabad for talks with Iran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 美国副总统J.D.万斯抵达伊斯兰堡与伊朗进行会谈时，受到了巴基斯坦陆军元帅阿西姆·穆尼尔、副总理穆罕默德·伊沙克·达尔和内政部长莫辛·纳克维的迎接。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Vance landed in Islamabad for Iran/US talks, welcomed by Pakistani officials. They seem friendly.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 万斯降落在伊斯兰堡进行伊美会谈，受到巴基斯坦官员的欢迎。他们看起来很友好。

text: 🇮🇷 Iran raises the issue of U.S. breaches of commitments with Pakistan’s Prime Minister Tasnim’s correspondent in Islamabad, Pakistan: ➡️ The Iranian delegation will raise the issue of the American side’s breaches of commitments in today’s noon meeting with Pakistan’s Prime Minister, Shehbaz Sharif. ➡️ The release of Iran’s assets and a ceasefire in Lebanon are among the preconditions for starting negotiations. ➡️ The United States had informed Pakistan, as the mediator of the talks, that it agrees to these preconditions and some other conditions for initiating negotiations. However, some of these have not yet been fulfilled. ➡️ In today’s meetings, the Iranian delegation intends to assess the U.S. position and its adherence to its commitments; after that, it will decide on whether to negotiate with the United States. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗向巴基斯坦总理提出美国违约问题。塔斯尼姆通讯社记者在巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡：➡️ 伊朗代表团将在今天中午与巴基斯坦总理谢赫巴兹·谢里夫的会议上提出美方违约的问题。➡️ 释放伊朗资产和黎巴嫩停火是开始谈判的前提条件。➡️ 美国曾通知作为会谈调解人的巴基斯坦，它同意这些前提条件以及开始谈判的其他一些条件。然而，其中一些尚未实现。➡️ 在今天的会议中，伊朗代表团打算评估美国的立场及其对承诺的遵守情况；之后，它将决定是否与美国进行谈判。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: JD Vance has landed in Pakistan. This time, Asim Munir is wearing a suit while welcoming him; previously, he wore a military uniform when welcoming the Iranian delegation.
text_zh: J.D.万斯已降落在巴基斯坦。这一次，阿西姆·穆尼尔穿着西装迎接他；此前，他在迎接伊朗代表团时穿着军装。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 Footage of Air Force 2, carrying U.S. Vice President J.D. Vance, arriving in Islamabad. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 U.S. Vice President J.D. Vance in Islamabad. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 载有美国副总统J.D.万斯的空军二号抵达伊斯兰堡的画面。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 美国副总统J.D.万斯在伊斯兰堡。@wfwitness

text: Former U.S. Secretary of State John Kerry: I think there's a misinterpretation here about what happens ultimately with bombing, bombing, bombing. You can’t bomb away knowledge in the heads of scientists who now have mastered the nuclear cycle.
text_zh: 前美国国务卿约翰·克里：我认为这里对最终轰炸、轰炸、再轰炸会发生什么存在误解。你无法炸掉那些已经掌握了核循环的科学家头脑中的知识。

text: Former U.S. Secretary of State John Kerry: When you go to war, you go to war hopefully with the support of your people. You have a defined threat. You have a clarity as to why you need to go to war. In this case, you have a war that is essentially fulfilling the long-held dream of Netanyahu to do as much damage to Iran as he is permitted to.
text_zh: 前美国国务卿约翰·克里：当你发动战争时，你希望在人民的支持下发动战争。你有一个明确的威胁。你清楚为什么要发动战争。在这种情况下，你进行的战争本质上是在实现内塔尼亚胡长期以来的梦想，即在被允许的范围内对伊朗造成尽可能大的破坏。

text: 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 The US delegation has landed in Islamabad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 美国代表团已降落在伊斯兰堡。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Senator Graham on Trump's rhetoric: If you’re talking to stone-cold homicidal maniacs, you need to speak the language they can understand.
text_zh: 格雷厄姆参议员谈特朗普的言论：如果你在和冷酷无情的杀人狂魔交谈，你需要说他们能听懂的语言。

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 Donald Trump: 📌 “We are loading ships with the best ammunition and the most advanced weapons ever made. If we fail to reach a deal with Iran, we will use them — and use them very effectively.” 📌 “We are dealing with new people, and we don’t know if they are telling the truth. They look us in the eye and say they will get rid of all nuclear weapons… then go to the press and say they prefer to continue uranium enrichment.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇸 唐纳德·特朗普：📌 “我们正在用有史以来制造的最好的弹药和最先进的武器装载船只。如果我们不能与伊朗达成协议，我们将使用它们——而且会非常有效地使用它们。” 📌 “我们正在与新人打交道，我们不知道他们是否在说真话。他们看着我们的眼睛说他们将销毁所有核武器……然后去媒体说他们更喜欢继续浓缩铀。” 与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇶🇦 Al Jazeera reveals Iranian strike damage across American interests in Qatar Exclusive footage from "What Lies Hidden Is Greater" reveals: — Al Udeid air base & other military sites — Early warning radars in the north — Ras Laffan industrial city — the heart of Qatar’s gas sector — US-linked assets in residential areas, infrastructure
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇶🇦 半岛电视台揭露伊朗对美国在卡塔尔利益的打击损害。独家镜头“隐藏的东西更大”揭示了：——乌代德空军基地及其他军事地点——北部的预警雷达——拉斯拉凡工业城——卡塔尔天然气部门的核心——住宅区和基础设施中与美国有关的资产

text: Senator Graham on Iran: If they say no now, that tells you how crazy they are.
text_zh: 格雷厄姆参议员谈伊朗：如果他们现在说不，那就说明他们有多疯狂。

text: Candace Owens to Trump: People will not fight behind, beside, or for someone who is fundamentally disloyal... MAGA is no longer commanded by you. You belong to the Epstein class.
text_zh: 坎迪斯·欧文斯对特朗普说：人们不会为一个本质上不忠诚的人而战，也不会站在他身边或为他而战……MAGA不再由你指挥。你属于爱泼斯坦阶层。

text: Candace Owens to Trump: Charlie Kirk died free. You will most certainly die a slave.
text_zh: 坎迪斯·欧文斯对特朗普说：查理·柯克死得自由。你肯定会死得像个奴隶。

text: NOW: JD Vance arrives in Pakistan for talks with Iranian officials.
text_zh: 现在：J.D.万斯抵达巴基斯坦与伊朗官员进行会谈。

text: Alex Jones to Trump: You should be kissing my ass.
text_zh: 亚历克斯·琼斯对特朗普说：你应该亲吻我的屁股。

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Tasnim: Iran's negotiating delegation is meeting Pakistani PM Shehbaz Sharif this afternoon in Islamabad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊朗谈判代表团今天下午在伊斯兰堡会见巴基斯坦总理谢赫巴兹·谢里夫。🔴 @DDGeopolitics
